inputs.override_headline: A 1% variance in pour costsilently costs you thousands.
inputs.override_body: On $50,000 in monthly bar revenue, a single percentage point of uncontrolled pour cost drains $6,000 every year. Most operators never see it because they are not measuring at the recipe level.
inputs.override_cta: Start controlling every pour. Free 14-day trial.

inputs.override_body: Supplier costs shift constantly, but most operators update recipe costs once a year at best. BarLedger ties every recipe to live ingredient pricing so your pour cost reflects today, not last January.
inputs.override_cta: Start your free 14-day trial. Link in bio.
